name: algovoi-mcp
summary: MCP server for AlgoVoi — create crypto payment links, verify payments, and generate MPP / x402 challenges from any MCP client (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf). Supports all 16 AlgoVoi networks: USDC on Algorand/VOI/Hedera/Stellar (mainnet + testnet) and native ALGO/VOI/HBAR/XLM.
author: AlgoVoi
